'''Sand gizzars''', or "'''''sando g'dizzards'''''" in the [[Huttese/Legends|Huttese]] [[Language/Legends|language]], was a [[Foodstuff/Legends|food]] dish created by the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] [[Species/Legends|species]]. The dish could be abrasive when eaten if it was served incorrectly.

==Description==
Sand gizzars, known as "''sando g'dizzards''" in the [[Huttese/Legends|Huttese]] [[Language/Legends|language]], was a [[Foodstuff/Legends|food]] dish<ref name="GPBATG" /> that was considered a delicacy<ref name="Sc">[[Scourge (novel)|''Scourge'']]</ref> and produced by the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] [[Species/Legends|species]]. Served as an entrée, the dish could be abrasive.<ref name="GPBATG" />

==History==
Despite the dish's abrasiveness, the [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Scholar/Legends|scholar]] [[Ebenn Q3 Baobab/Legends|Ebenn Q3 Baobab]] recommended to readers of the [[Book/Legends|book]] he authored in [[6 ABY/Legends|6 ABY]], the ''[[Galactic Phrase Book & Travel Guide]]'', that they try the dish if they were to visit any of the Hutt [[Restaurant/Legends|eateries]] in the [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceport]] of [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]. He claimed the dish was one of his favorite Hutt foods and provided the Huttese translation for it in the section of his book detailing the language. Baobab described Hutt cuisine as expensive in the book, claiming that it should be eaten with [[Glove/Legends|gloves]], but that utensils were necessary. He also stated that the cuisine was consumed casually in no particular order.<ref name="GPBATG" /> The dish was served along with other Hutt delicacies at a feast held by the Hutt [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]] [[Popara Anjiliac Diresto]] in his [[Popara's penthouse|penthouse]] on the planet [[Nal Hutta/Legends|Nal Hutta]]<ref name="Sc" /> in [[19 ABY/Legends|19 ABY]].<ref name="ERC">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]''</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
Sand gizzars were first mentioned in the [[2001]] book [[Galactic Phrase Book & Travel Guide (real-life book)|''Galactic Phrase Book & Travel Guide'']] written by [[Ben Burtt]].<ref name="GPBATG" /> They later appeared in the [[2012]] novel [[Scourge (novel)|''Scourge'']] written by [[Jeff Grubb]].<ref name="Sc" />
